_comment: Default CircleMUD -> IronMUD mobile mapping. Most MOB_*/AFF_* flags have no IronMUD equivalent — those are 'warn' so unsupported behavior surfaces in the dry-run report. Edit to suppress noise (use 'drop') or wire new translations once IronMUD systems exist. See docs/import-guide.md.

SPEC.message: MOB_SPEC special procedures not modeled; replace with a Rhai trigger after import.

AGGR_EVIL.message: alignment-conditional aggression not modeled (no alignment system).

AGGR_GOOD.message: alignment-conditional aggression not modeled (no alignment system).

AGGR_NEUTRAL.message: alignment-conditional aggression not modeled (no alignment system).

INVISIBLE.message: permanent AFF_INVISIBLE not modeled; player invisibility uses buffs only.

POISON.message: permanent AFF_POISON not modeled (different from on-hit MobileFlags.poisonous).

GROUP.info: transient runtime flag — never set on a prototype

CHARM.info: transient runtime flag — never set on a prototype
